rlevante 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Scoring and the model registry

for a given task and group variable, fit and record set of multigroup models

fit_task_models_multigroup.Rd

for a given task and group variable, fit and record set of multigroup models

Usage

fit_task_models_multigroup(
  task_data,
  models,
  priors,
  task,
  group,
  registry_dir
)

Arguments

task_data

dataframe with columns item_task, the value of subset_var, and data, where data is trial-level data

models

dataframe of models to fit, specified with columns nfact (number of factors), itemtype (Rasch/2PL), invariance (configural/metric/scalar)

priors

list of priors, where names are parameter names (e.g. d, a1) and values are vectors of length 3 (priorType, val1, val2)

task

one value in item_task

group

variable to use as groups (bare variable)

registry_dir

string indicating directory in which to save models

On this page
